channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Final Call for Fall 2026 NRB Beyond Blocks
item.description: Through Beyond Blocks, students participate in open houses, club fairs, workshops, and social events that help them stay connected, get involved, and thrive in their new environment. Submit an event: https://surveys.rpi.edu/jfe/form/SV_ers5JWvVJ7QSmjQ Questions? Contact fye@rpi.edu
item.author: Community

item.title: EHS Shares Tips for Preventing Heat-Related Illnesses
item.description: Managing heat stress is an important task in our day-to-day activities during summer months. Environmental Health & Safety (EHS) has assembled a number of steps you can take to prevent hazardous heat exposure and lower your risk of experiencing a heat-related illness.
item.author: Community

item.title: Shows Announced! TOPOS 2026 Music Festival | September 2–5
item.description: Date: Monday, June 8, 2026 (all day) - Every TOPOS 2026 presentation is a way into our own stories, and of those around us. Featuring Vijay Iyer, Wadada Leo Smith, Miho Hatori, Edward George, Paul Abbott, IMA, Rock City Falls Trio (Improv Spaces), Sun Dogs (Improv Spaces), Fred Moten, and The Silent Light—TOPOS 2026 brings together different forms of music, not as genres but as provocative sites of experience. A free BBQ at EMPAC keeps the conversation going! Find the full festival schedule,…
item.author: Community

item.title: Festival Passes Now On Sale! TOPOS 2026 at EMPAC | September 2–5
item.description: Date: Monday, June 15, 2026 (all day) - TOPOS Music Festival passes are now on sale! Experience every show with one all-inclusive pass. Featuring performances and more from Vijay Iyer, Wadada Leo Smith, Miho Hatori, Edward George, Paul Abbott, IMA, Rock City Falls Trio (Improv Spaces), Sun Dogs (Improv Spaces), Fred Moten, and The Silent Light, TOPOS 2026 brings together different forms of music, not as genres but as provocative sites of experience. Learn more at empac.rpi.edu and purchase your…
item.author: Community

item.title: Carousel Maintenance Scheduled for June 17th
item.description: Carousel has planned maintenance for the Rensselaer cloud instance on Wednesday, Jun 17, 2026 between 9pm and 11pm Eastern time. During this window, there will be a period where the user interface will be inaccessible (slides cannot be uploaded or modified), and players will display cached content. Players will all automatically reconnect and display updated content once maintenance has been completed.
item.author: Community

item.title: Submissions being accepted for Fall 2026 Orientation Resource Fair
item.description: Date: Monday, June 15, 2026 (all day) - Represent your office/department at First-Year New Student Orientation Resource Fair, on Sunday, August 23, 2026 from 10am to 2pm! The resource fair is a great way to meet the incoming class of 2030 and their families, and also share information about your office and programs. To submit your interest, please click the link above and complete the form by Monday, June 15. If you have any questions please reach out to fye@rpi.edu
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: RPI MAX Annual Performance Evaluations - Join HR Virtual Office Hours
item.description:
Human Resources invites managers and staff to attend upcoming Virtual HR Office Hours to answer questions regarding the RPI MAX Annual Staff Performance Evaluation process. Stop in for help with PageUp navigation, the evaluation process, timelines, and related topics. We look forward to connecting with you!

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
